B3ThemeHandlingAuditReport.title: B.3 Theme Handling - Audit Report
B3ThemeHandlingAuditReport.description: Comprehensive audit of Comserv theme system, CSS variable usage, and inline style compliance. Part of Daily Plan Dec 26 quick wins.
